message:
Add PromptDetailModal component and integrate with page

- Create PromptDetailModal component with:
  - Desktop: Dialog modal with scrollable content
  - Mobile: BottomSheet (thumb-friendly, swipe to dismiss)
  - Variable inputs with localStorage persistence per prompt ID
  - Template rendering with variable substitution
  - Copy/Install/Download action buttons
  - Context textarea for additional input
- Integrate modal with page.tsx handlePromptClick callback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
